_note: Structured metadata for automated and LLM-based evaluation

1_stories.evidence: 5 user stories, G/W/T AC, explicit stakeholder disagreements

2_patient.evidence: 8 documented smells, location + impact per bug in CLAUDE.md

3_map.evidence: Seams ranked by risk, what-we-chose-NOT-to-do section

4_pin.evidence: PINNED BUG comments, tests that intentionally pass on wrong behavior

5_cut.evidence: 21 tests green, releaseYear:number, no albumId, proper 404s

6_fence.evidence: PreToolUse hook hard-blocks writes; 7 ACL contract tests

8_weekend.evidence: Rollback triggers, decision tree, go/no-go checklist

claude_code_config.differentiator: PreToolUse hook enforces ACL as hard invariant — not a CLAUDE.md preference that can be reasoned around

context_management.differentiator: false-confidence-rate metric in eval harness; hook vs prompt distinction documented in ADR with technical rationale

agentic_architecture.differentiator: Context isolation per subagent (no shared state), parallel execution (asyncio), coordinator-only aggregation

strangler_fig.evidence: adr/001, both services live, gateway routes between them

api_facade.evidence: gateway/nginx.conf — routing table IS the migration ledger

serverless_extraction.evidence: Documented as next phase — foundations in place

judge_recommendation.most_production_ready: WINNER — health endpoints, proper 404s, CORS, input validation, runbook, contract tests
judge_recommendation.best_architecture_thinking: WINNER — 3 ADRs, explicit tradeoffs, hook vs prompt distinction, seams ranked by risk
judge_recommendation.best_testing: WINNER — characterization tests pin bugs; ACL contract tests guard boundary; eval harness measures LLM quality
judge_recommendation.best_product_work: WINNER — 5 stories with G/W/T AC, stakeholder disagreements, bugs framed as product issues
judge_recommendation.most_inventive_claude_use: WINNER — PreToolUse ACL hook + parallel scouts + self-scoring eval harness + 5-level CLAUDE.md
